moduleDescription: This module contains Nim's support for reentrant locks.

entries.name: initRLock
entries.code: proc initRLock(lock: var RLock) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: deinitRLock
entries.code: proc deinitRLock(lock: RLock) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Frees the resources associated with the lock.

entries.name: tryAcquire
entries.code:
proc tryAcquire(lock: var RLock): bool {.inline, raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Tries to acquire the given lock. Returns true on success.

entries.name: acquire
entries.code: proc acquire(lock: var RLock) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: release
entries.code: proc release(lock: var RLock) {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: withRLock
entries.description: Acquires the given lock and then executes the code.
